name: Albatross Golf Simulator
about: Albatross Golf Simulator offers an elevated indoor golf experience featuring tour-level TrackMan iO technology for players of all ages and skill levels. The venue provides a private space for playing iconic courses from around the globe year-round, with a focus on accurate ball data tracking and advanced simulation technology. Booking is required, and access is granted via a unique code for self-check-in during scheduled time slots.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level TrackMan iO simulator providing accurate ball and club data
Self-check-in access for private, secure sessions
Wide range of global golf courses available to play
Flexible late-night hours for after-play sessions
Professional-quality technology for serious practice and play

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-level simulator with high-speed camera, optically enhanced radar tracking, and radar/infrared high-speed imaging

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf clubs are available for rent at $10 per round. Complimentary golf balls are provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information about bringing outside food or drinks to the venue.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, as it depends on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue states it's for players of all ages and levels, including kids.
